[01 / Marketing]

Digital Marketing.

Pipeline-first marketing: SEO that ranks, paid that performs, content that compounds, and a brand system built for the long game.

  • Paid Media — Google, Meta, LinkedIn02
  • Social & Content Strategy03

[02 / Engineering]

IT Solutions.

The systems that make marketing work: fast sites, clean data, smart automations, and integrations that connect the stack end-to-end.

  • Web Development — Next, Astro, WP01
  • Workflow Automation02
  • CRM Integration (HubSpot, Salesforce)03

(04) Principles
Why ORBIX?
Five Operating Rules
01
No fluff. Just results.
Every engagement ties to a real business metric. Revenue, pipeline, retention.
02
Marketing + IT — one roof.
Strategist, designer, engineer, media buyer — one room. No hand-off tax.
03
Transparent by default.
Live dashboards, weekly recap, shared Slack. Always know what we're doing.
04
Built for B2B growth.
Long sales cycles. Complex products. Multi-stakeholder buying. Our terrain.
05
Fast. No bureaucracy.
Senior operators, flat structure. A decision in hours, not weeks.
(05) Process
How We Work
Five-Step Operating Loop
Phase 01 — Discovery
Phase 01 — DiscoveryAudit & deep-dive
01
We learn your business and goals.
Deep immersion in your product, market, ICP, sales motion, tech stack and historical data. We emerge with a signed-off brief and a shared definition of what winning looks like.
  • Stakeholder interviews
  • Analytics & funnel audit
  • Competitive teardown
  • Signed success metrics
